$comment: Draft schema. Not finalized — structure may change. Intended to align with the FedRAMP Historical VDR Activity Schema referenced in VER-TFR-MRH.
title: FedRAMP Historical VDR Activity (VER-TFR-MRH)
description: Machine-readable historical vulnerability detection and response activity for automated retrieval per VER-TFR-MRH. Update frequency varies by certification class (Class A: monthly/MAY; B: monthly/SHOULD; C: 14 days/SHOULD; D: 7 days/SHOULD).

activeVulnerabilities.title: Active Vulnerabilities
activeVulnerabilities.description: All non-accepted vulnerabilities. Each record follows the fields required by VER-RPT-VDT.

acceptedVulnerabilities.title: Accepted Vulnerabilities
acceptedVulnerabilities.description: All accepted vulnerabilities. Each record follows the fields required by VER-RPT-AVI.
